prompt: Use case: photorealistic-natural. Asset type: Sip Studies Grapes & Grains fruit reference photo and three-view rotation frame. Primary request: Photorealistic front view of one intact ripe yellow banana for beverage education. Subject: exactly one whole unpeeled ripe banana, naturally curved crescent shape, horizontal or gently diagonal on a dark teal studio surface, yellow peel with small natural brown speckles, visible stem on one end and blossom tip on the other. Viewpoint: front three-quarter view of the broad curved side. Scene/backdrop: premium dark teal studio background matching the Sip Studies UI, subtle surface, no clutter. Style/medium: macro educational product photography, realistic banana morphology, natural peel texture, accurate color, high clarity. Composition/framing: one centered banana, fully visible with generous margin, square crop, suitable for card display and 3-frame turntable viewer. Lighting/mood: soft directional studio light, crisp detail, restrained premium academic feel. Constraints: exactly one banana only; intact unpeeled banana; no peeled section; no exposed banana flesh; no cut fruit; no banana bunch; no vertical standing banana; no impossible fused peel; no extra stems; no text, labels, watermark, logo, hands, packaging, glassware, cartoon, or illustration. Avoid: malformed peel geometry, hallucinated extra fruit, cut-off edges, repeated borders, white seam lines, UI elements, captions, plates, bowls, bags, brand marks, and unrelated fruit.
style: macro educational product photography, realistic single whole banana reference
composition: centered single intact banana, square crop, generous margin, fully visible
constraints: exactly one intact unpeeled banana, no peeled section, no exposed flesh, no text, no labels, no watermark, no logos, no hands, no packaging, no clutter
